presets.name: Baseline
presets.description: The current default reward configuration. Good starting point — balanced between speed and stability.

presets.name: Speed Focus
presets.description: Emphasises forward velocity and tracking. Robot learns to move faster but may be less stable. Try this after a baseline run succeeds.

presets.name: Stability Focus
presets.description: Strongly penalises tilting and height deviation. Robot learns to stay upright and balanced first. Good for early-stage training when the robot keeps falling.
